title: Tabulation characters should be avoided
description:
Tabulation characters should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-formattedmaintainabilityCode SmellThis rule is deprecated, and will eventually be removed. The tab width can differ from one development environment to another.  Using tabs may require other developers to configure their environment (text
editor, preferences, etc. ) to read source code.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Avoid using tabulation characters for indentation
